targetSenders().details: Returns sender allowlist configured via `targetSender` (empty means no sender allowlist).

documentation.text: @dev Excludes a contract address from invariant target selection.

typeDescriptions.typeString: struct StdInvariant.FuzzSelector storage ref[] storage ref
function (struct StdInvariant.FuzzSelector storage ref[] storage pointer,struct StdInvariant.FuzzSelector storage ref)

documentation.text: @dev Excludes specific selectors on a contract from invariant fuzzing.
@dev Excludes a sender from invariant fuzzing; exclusion takes precedence over targeted senders.

typeDescriptions.typeString: function (string storage ref[] storage pointer,string storage ref)

documentation.text: @dev Excludes an artifact identifier from invariant target selection.

typeDescriptions.typeString: function (string storage ref[] storage pointer,string storage ref)

documentation.text: @dev Targets an artifact identifier for invariant fuzzing.

typeDescriptions.typeString: struct StdInvariant.FuzzArtifactSelector storage ref[] storage ref
function (struct StdInvariant.FuzzArtifactSelector storage ref[] storage pointer,struct StdInvariant.FuzzArtifactSelector storage ref)

documentation.text: @dev Targets specific selectors for an artifact identifier during invariant fuzzing.
@dev Targets a contract address for invariant fuzzing.

typeDescriptions.typeString: struct StdInvariant.FuzzSelector storage ref[] storage ref
function (struct StdInvariant.FuzzSelector storage ref[] storage pointer,struct StdInvariant.FuzzSelector storage ref)

documentation.text: @dev Targets specific selectors on a contract for invariant fuzzing.
@dev Adds a sender to the invariant sender allowlist; when non-empty, fuzzing uses only targeted non-excluded senders.

typeDescriptions.typeString: struct StdInvariant.FuzzInterface storage ref[] storage ref
function (struct StdInvariant.FuzzInterface storage ref[] storage pointer,struct StdInvariant.FuzzInterface storage ref)

documentation.text: @dev Targets an address plus artifact interfaces for invariant fuzzing.
@dev Returns artifact identifiers configured via `excludeArtifact`.
@dev Returns contract addresses configured via `excludeContract`.

typeDescriptions.typeString: struct StdInvariant.FuzzSelector storage ref[] storage ref

documentation.text: @dev Returns selector exclusions configured via `excludeSelector`.
@dev Returns senders configured via `excludeSender`.
@dev Returns artifact identifiers configured via `targetArtifact`.

typeDescriptions.typeString: struct StdInvariant.FuzzArtifactSelector storage ref[] storage ref

documentation.text: @dev Returns artifact-selector targets configured via `targetArtifactSelector`.
@dev Returns contract addresses configured via `targetContract`.

typeDescriptions.typeString: struct StdInvariant.FuzzSelector storage ref[] storage ref

documentation.text: @dev Returns selector targets configured via `targetSelector`.
@dev Returns sender allowlist configured via `targetSender` (empty means no sender allowlist).

typeDescriptions.typeString: struct StdInvariant.FuzzInterface storage ref[] storage ref

documentation.text: @dev Returns address-interface targets configured via `targetInterface`.
